change_summary: Moved getBoundingClientRect() out of render body into useLayoutEffect to prevent forced reflows.
Wrapped scroll listener updates in requestAnimationFrame and added throttling to reduce layout thrashing.
Removed manual isRTL checks for flex-row-reverse; relying on global dir attribute.
Created src/styles/z-index.ts and replaced hardcoded z-9999 with Z_INDEX.TOOLTIP.
Enabled virtualization for the main inventory table to improve performance with large datasets.
Added IDs to inventory form inputs and associated them with labels using htmlFor for better accessibility.
Replaced dynamic barrel imports with explicit named imports to enable tree-shaking and reduce bundle size.
Replaced physical margin-left with logical margin-inline-start (ms-1).
Replaced conditional transform-origin with logical origin-inline-end.
Replaced physical padding (pl-3 pr-8) with logical padding (ps-3 pe-8).
Replaced physical right positioning (right-1.5) with logical end positioning (end-1.5).
Replaced physical left positioning with logical start positioning for the scanning line.
Replaced physical right positioning with logical end positioning for scanner controls.
Replaced physical right positioning with logical end positioning for the cart badge.
Replaced ml-auto with ms-auto in the resend link button.
Replaced right-3 with end-3 and used logical slide-in animations for input overlays.
Associated form labels with inputs using id and htmlFor in the branch edit modal.
Replaced physical padding (pr-1) and absolute positioning with logical equivalents.
Ensured form layout consistency in RTL by using logical grid and spacing utilities.
Added aria-label to the floating help button for screen reader support.
Replaced conditional left/right positioning with logical end-6 for the help button.
Added role='log' and aria-live='polite' to the notification list for better screen reader feedback.
Added list and listitem roles to the closed tabs history and replaced manual flex-row-reverse with logical layout.
Associated organization name and ID labels with their respective fields using id and htmlFor.
Implemented hybrid alignment: action icons fixed on the physical right ('right-3'), while placeholders mirror logically ('placeholder:text-start').
